delegation_capability.evidence_ref: Two fresh isolated research agents and two different-fresh isolated review agents completed through the built-in default-agent channel.

proof_refs: Fresh Pre-Decision Review 2 returned CLEAN for the exact 13-entry manifest.

objective: Prepare evidence-grounded Minimal, Standard, and Full shipped-default artifact candidates, obtain clean independent pre-decision review, commit the exact decision-ready subject, and stop for the explicit user decision without promoting PG-DEFAULT-01 or beginning HCM-0.7.

sections: Candidate B - Standard catalog, lean selected default

work_completed: Validated HCM-0.6 authority, completed dependencies, clean entry state, and documentation-only boundary without selecting a prior handoff.
Completed separate fresh repository-truth and external primary-source research and reconciled both into one decision dossier.
Compared Minimal, Standard, and Full candidates across all frozen rubric axes while separating shipped kinds, selected instances, requiredness, cardinality, and lifecycle.
Accepted two Required Review 1 findings, performed bounded parent remediation, reran proof, and obtained a different-fresh CLEAN Review 2.
Committed the exact review-clean 13-entry pre-decision subject as a89e0edb2ec70bbbab9b44f45148410b9eeee985 without recording user approval or promoting PG-DEFAULT-01.

deliverables.summary: Decision method, rubric, authority boundary, non-goals, and later exit gate.
Repository inventory, 21 primary-source links, failure modes, and candidate-neutral decision implications.
Review-clean Minimal, Standard, and Full comparison plus non-authoritative parent recommendation.
Pre-decision proof, delegated research, Review 1 remediation, and open user-decision gate.
Intentionally absent until the user explicitly approves the kind, instance, requiredness, and constitutional-root choices.

decisions.summary: Treat current enums, descriptors, templates, filenames, setup behavior, and examples only as precedent and migration-cost evidence.
decisions.authority_effect: No current implementation artifact selects the shipped default by inertia.

decisions.summary: Present Minimal, Standard, and Full through one frozen rubric and preserve the parent preference for Standard as a hypothesis only.
decisions.authority_effect: The user retains sole decision authority; no candidate is approved.

decisions.summary: Stop at human_input after the CLEAN pre-decision review and primary commit.
decisions.authority_effect: HCM-0.6 and PG-DEFAULT-01 remain open; HCM-0.7 is prohibited until the explicit decision is recorded and later final review passes.

findings.summary: Resolved: all frozen rubric axes and consistent candidate scope/cardinality/lifecycle/review/renderer/Projection/SDK-transport posture are now explicit.
Resolved: an exact untracked-aware byte scan covers all six added Markdown files and ordinary git diff is labeled tracked-only.

blockers.summary: The shipped kind catalog, selected default instances, requiredness/applicability, and constitutional-root binding require explicit user approval.
blockers.resume_condition: The user answers the first product-posture question; the parent then continues one focused decision question at a time.

escalations.trigger: Research and pre-decision review are complete, but HCM-0.6 reserves shipped-default authority to an explicit user decision.
escalations.current_resolution: Three review-clean discussion candidates exist; Candidate B is the parent hypothesis only and PG-DEFAULT-01 is open.
escalations.target_resolution: Explicit user-approved product posture followed by exact kind, default-instance, requiredness/applicability, and constitutional-root selections.
escalations.decision_required: Choose the product posture for the next question: A Minimal, B Standard catalog with lean selected default, or C Full governance/operations catalog.
options: A - Minimal product: smallest first-party catalog and two universal project instances.
B - Standard catalog, lean selected default: broader common first-party kinds with only a small universal core.
C - Full governance/operations catalog: maximum first-party structure with higher default burden and overlap risk.
escalations.recommendation: B - Standard catalog, lean selected default. It preserves a small universal core while avoiding early custom-kind fragmentation; this is a hypothesis, not approval.
escalations.resume_condition: User explicitly answers A, B, C, or states another product posture.

validation.command: Fresh Pre-Decision Review 2 exact 13-entry manifest replay

validation.evidence_ref: CLEAN; no Critical or Required findings.

validation.command: Exact six-file untracked-aware Markdown byte scan plus semantic rubric assertions

Supported roots passed and forbidden fixture was rejected.

pack_updates.reason: Create only after explicit user approval.
Promote only after approved decision and later final proof/review.

resume.objective: Run the HCM-0.6 shipped-default decision session one focused question at a time, beginning with product posture.
resume.condition: Resume when the user answers A, B, C, or states another product posture.
allowed_scope: Ask and resolve one HCM-0.6 default-set decision question at a time.
Use Candidate B only as the initial hypothesis and preserve the user as decision authority.
After product posture, refine exact shipped kinds, selected instances, requiredness/applicability, paths/labels, and constitutional-root binding before writing the decision record.
prohibited_scope: Do not treat Candidate B, current enums/templates/examples, or primary commit as approval.
Do not promote PG-DEFAULT-01, close HCM-0.6, start HCM-0.7, implement Rust/runtime/schema/CLI/SDK/Tauri/Substrate work, or mutate HCM-0.5/HCM-0.9.
Do not batch the remaining decision questions or write the decision record before explicit answers.
acceptance_criteria: The user explicitly chooses A, B, C, or another product posture.
The parent records that answer as discussion authority only and asks the next single focused HCM-0.6 question.
Final HCM-0.6 completion later records all exact selections and obtains a different-fresh final review over the approved subject.
stop_conditions: Stop after each focused question if the next answer is absent.
Stop if a choice requires broader authority, contradicts frozen HCM-0.2/HCM-0.3/HCM-0.4/HCM-0.5 semantics, or widens into implementation.

chat_summary: HCM-0.6 research and the Minimal/Standard/Full comparison are review-clean and committed. No default is approved; PG-DEFAULT-01 remains open. Human input is required on the first product-posture choice. Parent hypothesis: B, a broad first-party catalog with a lean selected default.
